options: A narrator who lies to the reader

question: Compare modernism and postmodernism in two sentences.
options: Modernism emphasizes coherence and grand narratives; postmodernism questions grand narratives and embraces fragmentation
Both reject all previous literary forms
answer: Modernism emphasizes coherence and grand narratives; postmodernism questions grand narratives and embraces fragmentation
